title: Entity Extraction Architecture
description: Mermaid block diagram showing how modern entity extraction combines rule-based, ML, and LLM strategies in parallel, then merges and links the results into a structured output.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

learningObjectives: Compare rule-based, ML, and LLM entity-extraction strategies
Explain how merging and entity linking produce a structured output
educational.prerequisites: Familiarity with named-entity recognition and intents
